CREATE TABLE vectors (id Int32, vector Tuple(Float64, Float64));
SELECT id, L2Normalize(vector) AS unit_vector FROM vectors;
SELECT id FROM vectors WHERE L2Normalize(vector) = (0.6, 0.8);
SELECT id, L2Normalize(vector) AS unit_vector FROM (SELECT vector FROM vectors WHERE id > 1) AS subquery;
SELECT v1.id, L2Normalize(v1.vector) AS unit_vector1, L2Normalize(v2.vector) AS unit_vector2 FROM vectors AS v1 JOIN vectors AS v2 ON v1.id != v2.id;
CREATE TABLE result AS SELECT id, L2Normalize(vector) AS unit_vector FROM vectors;
SELECT vector FROM vectors WHERE vector = (0, 0) LIMIT 1;
SELECT id, L2Normalize((3, 4)) AS unit_vector FROM vectors WHERE id = 1;
SELECT L2Normalize((SUM(x), SUM(y))) FROM (SELECT vector.1 AS x, vector.2 AS y FROM vectors) AS aggregated_vectors;
